response.justification: The candidate's extensive experience as a Staff and Senior Software Engineer at leading tech companies significantly exceeds the requirements for a Junior/Mid-Level, entry-level position. Although their technical skills in TypeScript, React, AWS, and their relevant industry experience are exceptional, the pronounced overqualification and potential mismatch in career expectations make them an unsuitable fit for the specified seniority level of this role.
strengths: Highly proficient in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and web architecture.
Strong expertise in AWS and Kubernetes, aligning with nice-to-have qualifications.
Relevant experience with environmental/geo-data platforms and AI-agent infrastructure.
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an "Entry level. Full-time individual contributor" role.
Risk of misaligned career expectations or dissatisfaction due to seniority mismatch.
No explicit PostgreSQL experience, though general relational DB knowledge is present.
